product: Automatic email notifications for expiring personal access tokens (Public…
tagline: Databricks now sends automatic email notifications to workspace users approximately 7 days before their personal access tokens expire.
what_it_does: Databricks now sends automatic email notifications to workspace users approximately 7 days before their personal access tokens expire. To authenticate to the Databricks REST API, a user can create a personal access token (PAT) and use it in their REST API request. A user can also create a service principal and use it with a personal access token to call Databricks REST APIs in their CI/CD tools and automation.
why_it_matters: Databricks recommends you minimize your personal access token exposure with the following steps: 1.
